title: anguria capitata var. pallida
intro: Anguria capitata var. pallida, also known as the white gourd or white melon, is a variety of the anguria plant, which belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family of gourds and melons. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of anguria capitata var. pallida include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
